body.title: On it rebuilt: task to goal adoption trigger
body.result: Rebuilt On it habit from response→action type with code_ref: tools.ops:goal_adopt. New goal_adopt tool stores EPISODIC goal memory (goal_active=True, goal_type=TACTICAL) and posts adoption to channel. Trigger updated to fire on task-assignment phrases. Inertia restored to 0.3. D275 task→goal translation now fires on habit dispatch. 567 tests pass.
body.description: When Igor says On it, that phrase IS the moment of goal adoption. Rebuild the On it habit to: (1) parse goal from triggering message, (2) create GOAL_TACTICAL node in TWM + memories, (3) set current_strategy to relevant habit/engram, (4) emit On it as confirmation, (5) immediately dispatch step 1. Without this, D275 goal machinery has no trigger — task to goal translation never fires.
